blocks.content: Back in LA, he spent three days editing.
Darius left him alone without being asked. Kit sat at his desk with headphones on and the footage spread out in front of him and worked, deliberately, every cut meaning something.
The street. The field in daylight. Rhonda in the booth. Mrs. Jones in the hallway. Savannah in socks on the porch. His mom at the door.
He watched his mom's footage back three times. What she'd said about his dad. He is not his father. She hadn't planned to say it.

Kit had watched his mom become someone who didn't need anyone after that. Watched her build a life that was whole and good on her own terms. He was proud of her. He was also terrified of repeating what had made that necessary.
The field at night last. His own face in the dark. His voice saying the true thing.
He watched it through once without stopping. Then he closed the laptop and sat in the quiet for a while.
